curation_notes: The patch adds authentication and CSRF middleware to the AI Agent endpoint (POST /apps/:appId/agent) in Parse-Dashboard/app.js. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function) is correct — the endpoint entirely lacked authentication, allowing unauthenticated access to master-key-level database operations. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern; the agent endpoint is uniquely defined in app.js.
